# Astra - AI Context File

Astra is a real-time video synchronization platform for watch parties. Stream movies, TV shows, and anime with friends while keeping everyone in perfect sync.

## What Astra Does

- **Real-time video sync** — Watch parties with frame-accurate synchronization across all viewers
- **Multi-platform support** — YouTube, Vimeo, direct video URLs, and HLS streams
- **Host controls** — Play, pause, seek, and volume control for all participants
- **Chat with screenshots** — Share moments from the video directly in chat
- **Video calls** — Face-to-face viewing with up to 9 participants

## Key Features

- Drift correction with 200ms sync loop
- Cross-platform video playback (native, embed, HLS)
- Subtitle support with auto-sync
- Room privacy with password protection
- Auto-next for continuous episode playback

## Supported Content

- Movies (TMDB integration)
- TV Shows (TMDB integration)
- Anime (TMDB integration)
- Direct video URLs (.mp4, .webm, .m3u8)
- YouTube videos
- Vimeo videos

## Links

- Home: https://astra-sync.vercel.app
- Create Room: https://astra-sync.vercel.app/create
- Login: https://astra-sync.vercel.app/login
- API: https://astra-sync.vercel.app/api/

## Pricing

Astra is a free, open-source project.
